import io

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    return Err("invalid input")
  end
  let f = fib(n)
  print("fib=#{f}")
  Ok(())
end

import string

fn fib(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n == 0
    return 0
  end
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 1
  mut i = 1
  while i < n
    let tmp = a + b
    a = b
    b = tmp
    i = i + 1
  end
  b
end
